front: Explain the concept of antibody glycoengineering for enhanced effector functions.
back: Glycoengineering modifies Fc glycosylation to enhance ADCC. Afucosylation (obinutuzumab) increases Fc-gRIIIa binding 50-fold. CHO cell line engineering with FUT8 knockout. Glycan modifications: sialylation (anti-inflammatory), galactosylation (complement activation).
